allow: PowerShell(if \(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\skills"\) { Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\skills" } else { Write-Output "no user skills dir" }; if \(Test-Path ".claude\\skills"\) { Get-ChildItem ".claude\\skills" } else { Write-Output "no project skills dir" })
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(t['path'], t['type']\) for t in d['tree']]")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(t['path']\) for t in d['tree'] if 'subscription' in t['path'].lower\(\) or 'product' in t['path'].lower\(\) or 'webhook' in t['path'].lower\(\)]")
